title: Progressives no longer ready to work in current government
summary_full: The Progressives do not support the continuation of the current government led by Evika Siliņa (New Unity) and are calling on President Edgars Rinkēvičs to begin consultations on the formation of a new government, Andris Šuvajevs, leader of the Progressives parliamentary faction, said after a meeting with Siliņa on Wednesday.
